title: eranthemum longifolium
intro: Eranthemum longifolium, also known as the Blue Pilea or Long-leaf Eranthemum, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family that is native to India. The leaves of this plant contain flavonoids and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eranthemum longifolium include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and prevent water retention. Eranthemum longifolium is typically prepared as a decoction or infused in water to be consumed as a herbal remedy, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
